privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information Profik Pro collects and how it is used. Profik Pro is the contractor-side app of the Profik marketplace, which connects customers with cleaning professionals in the Czech Republic.
privacy.dataCollected: Account details you provide (name, email, phone number, password), the offers and messages you send to clients, and your balance top-up history.
privacy.location: While you are using the app, we use your device location to show open jobs near you on the map and how far each job is from your current position. Location is not tracked in the background.
privacy.notifications: We use your device's push notification token to alert you about new client messages and offer updates.
privacy.balance: Adding funds to your balance is completed in an external, secure Stripe checkout page opened in your browser - Profik Pro does not store your card details.
privacy.sharing: Clients can see your name, profile, and the offers you send on their jobs. Your phone number is never shared with clients - all communication happens through the in-app offer chat.
privacy.retention: Your data is kept for as long as your account is active. You can permanently delete your account at any time from Account settings -> Delete account; your past offers and messages are anonymized rather than removed, so job history for clients stays intact.
privacy.contact: If you have questions about this policy, contact us at {{email}}.

support.title: Help & Support
support.intro: Need a hand with something? Here are answers to common questions, or you can reach us directly.
support.faq1A: On the Open Jobs tab, browse jobs near you on the map and list. Tap a job to see its service type, property details, location, and the client's budget.
support.faq2Q: How do I send an offer?
support.faq2A: Open a job, tap Send Offer, set your price and an optional message, then submit. Track it in My Jobs under Pending / Accepted / Declined.
support.faq3Q: How do I message a client?
support.faq3A: Open your offer and tap into the Offer Chat to message the client directly - no need to share your phone number.
support.faq4Q: How do I add funds to my balance?
support.faq4A: Open Balance from your profile, enter an amount, and continue to the secure payment page. Your balance is used to pay platform fees.
support.faq5Q: How do I delete my account?
support.faq5A: Go to Account settings and scroll to Delete account. This permanently removes your account and cannot be undone.
support.contactFallback: Couldn't open your email app. Please email us at {{email}} instead.

about.title: About
about.description: Profik Pro is the app for cleaning professionals who want a steady stream of local jobs. Browse open jobs near you, send your price, chat with clients, and get the job done - all in one app.

welcome.title: Welcome to Profik Pro
welcome.body: Find cleaning jobs near you, offer your price, and get hired - all in one app.

about.title: What is Profik Pro?
about.p1: Profik Pro connects cleaning professionals with clients who need work done nearby. New jobs appear on the map and in a list - with the service type, property details, location, and the client's budget shown up front.
about.p2: You decide which jobs to take and what price to offer. No cold calls, no ads, no chasing leads.
about.p3: Chat with clients directly in the app, win the job, and build your reputation with real reviews.

browse.title: Browse open jobs
browse.description: See new cleaning jobs near you on the map and in the list, with full details and the client's budget.

offer.title: Send your offer
offer.description: Set your own price and add a short message so the client knows why you're the right pick.

chat.title: Chat and get hired
chat.description: Agree on the details in the built-in chat - no need to share your phone number.

paid.title: Do the job, get paid
paid.description: Complete the work, collect reviews that win you more jobs, and top up your balance to cover platform fees.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: The screen ran into an unexpected error. You can go back and try again - your progress on the previous screens is safe.
